positive.stdout:
% Refutation found. Thanks to Tanya!
% SZS status Theorem for platypus_pos
% SZS output start Proof for platypus_pos
2. ! [X0] : (platypus(X0) => ~has_teeth(X0)) [input(axiom)]
3. ! [X0] : (platypus(X0) => mammal(X0)) [input(axiom)]
5. ! [X0] : (platypus(X0) => (mammal(X0) & ~has_teeth(X0))) [input(conjecture)]
6. ~! [X0] : (platypus(X0) => (mammal(X0) & ~has_teeth(X0))) [negated conjecture 5]
8. ! [X0] : (~has_teeth(X0) | ~platypus(X0)) [ennf transformation 2]
9. ! [X0] : (mammal(X0) | ~platypus(X0)) [ennf transformation 3]
10. ? [X0] : ((~mammal(X0) | has_teeth(X0)) & platypus(X0)) [ennf transformation 6]
13. ? [X0] : ((~mammal(X0) | has_teeth(X0)) & platypus(X0)) => ((~mammal(sK1) | has_teeth(sK1)) & platypus(sK1)) [skolem symbol introduction]
14. (~mammal(sK1) | has_teeth(sK1)) & platypus(sK1) [skolemisation 10,13]
17. ~platypus(X0) | ~has_teeth(X0) [cnf transformation 8]
18. ~platypus(X0) | mammal(X0) [cnf transformation 9]
19. platypus(sK1) [cnf transformation 14]
20. ~mammal(sK1) | has_teeth(sK1) [cnf transformation 14]
22. 1 <=> has_teeth(sK1) [avatar definition]
26. 2 <=> mammal(sK1) [avatar definition]
28. ~mammal(sK1) <- (~2) [avatar component clause 26]
29. 1 | ~2 [avatar split clause 20,26,22]
30. ~has_teeth(sK1) [resolution 17,19]
31. ~1 [avatar split clause 30,22]
32. mammal(sK1) [resolution 18,19]
33. $false <- (~2) [forward subsumption resolution 32,28]
34. 2 [avatar contradiction clause 33]
s1. ~2 | 1 [sat_conversion 29]
s2. ~1 [sat_conversion 31]
s3. 2 [sat_conversion 34]
s4. # [rat s1,s2,s3]
35. $false [avatar sat refutation s4]
% SZS output end Proof for platypus_pos
% Termination reason: Refutation
